# Piece Assets

Drop a matching piece image set in this folder with these exact filenames:

- `wp.png`, `wn.png`, `wb.png`, `wr.png`, `wq.png`, `wk.png`
- `bp.png`, `bn.png`, `bb.png`, `br.png`, `bq.png`, `bk.png`

Notes:
- Use a stylistically consistent set for both white and black pieces.
- Transparent PNGs work best.
- Recommended size: 256x256 or 512x512.

If files are missing, the UI will fallback to unicode chess glyphs.
